flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Louisiana at Lafayette rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.8k → $22.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Louisiana at Lafayette fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Louisiana at Lafayette rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (22.9% → 26.9%).
